name: avaz-x402-workers
description: Facinet-based worker agents for the 4-Agent Article Pipeline

scripts.research1: cross-env PORT=4021 AGENT_TYPE=research AGENT_NAME=ResearchAgent1 tsx server.ts
scripts.research2: cross-env PORT=4022 AGENT_TYPE=research AGENT_NAME=ResearchAgent2 tsx server.ts
scripts.stats1: cross-env PORT=4023 AGENT_TYPE=stats AGENT_NAME=StatsAgent1 tsx server.ts
scripts.stats2: cross-env PORT=4024 AGENT_TYPE=stats AGENT_NAME=StatsAgent2 tsx server.ts
scripts.all: concurrently "npm run research1" "npm run research2" "npm run stats1" "npm run stats2"
